title: Craftable Enchanted Golden Apple +
body:
# Craftable Enchanted Golden Apple +
A simple mod that adds a recipe for the enchanted golden apple and 2 new advancements for enchanted golden apples!

### Crafting
![Crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bed4569c52aeca04727a2876009c65dc56937827.png)

### Advancements
![advancement](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/937b9da295567dcf59cce69c26e902850592df89.png)

![advancement1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/485e0ccda5b688fbbe220dd7a86cdbce23485209.png)

![advancement2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86971ce2352f606d0e316db717e461b0c813655d.png)

Currently working on support for the versions 1.12.2 1.16.5 1.19.1/2
